mapper.select: select id, email, title, pic, file_path, upload_time from ebooks order by upload_time desc
select id, email, title, pic, file_path, upload_time from ebooks where title like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
SELECT id, email, title, pic, file_path, upload_time FROM ebooks WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ebooks (email, title, pic, file_path, upload_time) VALUES (#{email}, #{title}, #{pic}, #{file_path}, NOW())
